title: Letter from Chair, CSPL, to Chair, House of Lords Conduct Committee
body: "A letter from the CSPL Chair, Doug Chalmers CB DSO OBE, to the Chair of the House of Lords Conduct Committee, Baroness Manningham-Buller LG DCB, following Doug Chalmers’ appearance in front of the Conduct Committee in October 2024 as part of their review of the Lords’ Code of Conduct. "
